'''鈭歠-l-s''' ('''kafalas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polder|polder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polder|polder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kafalas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifalas|thifalas]] || [[word:jifalas|jifalas]] || [[word:shifalas|shifalas]] || [[word:kifalas|kifalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufalas|thuthufalas]] || [[word:jujufalas|jujufalas]] || [[word:shushufalas|shushufalas]] || [[word:kukufalas|kukufalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufalas|thufalas]] || [[word:jufalas|jufalas]] || [[word:shufalas|shufalas]] || [[word:kufalas|kufalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufalas|thufalas]] || [[word:jufalas|jufalas]] || [[word:shufalas|shufalas]] || [[word:kufalas|kufalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefalas|thefalas]] || [[word:jefalas|jefalas]] || [[word:shefalas|shefalas]] || [[word:kefalas|kefalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofalas|thothofalas]] || [[word:jojofalas|jojofalas]] || [[word:shoshofalas|shoshofalas]] || [[word:kokofalas|kokofalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofalas|thofalas]] || [[word:jofalas|jofalas]] || [[word:shofalas|shofalas]] || [[word:kofalas|kofalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofalas|thofalas]] || [[word:jofalas|jofalas]] || [[word:shofalas|shofalas]] || [[word:kofalas|kofalas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]] || [[word:falas|falas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙falas|th忙falas]] || [[word:j忙falas|j忙falas]] || [[word:sh忙falas|sh忙falas]] || [[word:k忙falas|k忙falas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafalas|thathafalas]] || [[word:jajafalas|jajafalas]] || [[word:shashafalas|shashafalas]] || [[word:kakafalas|kakafalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafalas|thafalas]] || [[word:jafalas|jafalas]] || [[word:shafalas|shafalas]] || [[word:kafalas|kafalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafalas|thafalas]] || [[word:jafalas|jafalas]] || [[word:shafalas|shafalas]] || [[word:kafalas|kafalas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafalas|shafalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafalas|goshafalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafalas|gokishafalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafalasn眉|shafalasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafalasnkn眉|goshafalasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafalasn眉|gokishafalasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafalassh毛|shafalassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafalasnksh毛|goshafalasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafalassh毛|gokishafalassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafalasro|shafalasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafalasnkro|goshafalasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafalasro|gokishafalasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafalasmu|shafalasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafalasnkmu|goshafalasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafalasmu|gokishafalasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafalassher|shafalassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafalasnksher|goshafalasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafalassher|gokishafalassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafalasng|shafalasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafalasnkng|goshafalasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafalasng|gokishafalasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafalasya|shafalasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafalasnkya|goshafalasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafalasya|gokishafalasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafalasyam|shafalasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafalasnkyam|goshafalasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafalasyam|gokishafalasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafalasn眉sh毛|shafalasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafalasnkn眉sh毛|goshafalasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafalasn眉sh毛|gokishafalasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafalasn眉ro|shafalasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafalasnkn眉ro|goshafalasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafalasn眉ro|gokishafalasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafalasn眉mu|shafalasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafalasnkn眉mu|goshafalasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafalasn眉mu|gokishafalasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafalassh毛n眉|shafalassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafalasnksh毛n眉|goshafalasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafalassh毛n眉|gokishafalassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafalassh毛ro|shafalassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafalasnksh毛ro|goshafalasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafalassh毛ro|gokishafalassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafalassh毛mu|shafalassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafalasnksh毛mu|goshafalasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafalassh毛mu|gokishafalassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafalasron眉|shafalasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafalasnkron眉|goshafalasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafalasron眉|gokishafalasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafalasrosh毛|shafalasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafalasnkrosh毛|goshafalasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafalasrosh毛|gokishafalasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafalasromu|shafalasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafalasnkromu|goshafalasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafalasromu|gokishafalasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafalasmun眉|shafalasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafalasnkmun眉|goshafalasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafalasmun眉|gokishafalasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafalasmush毛|shafalasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafalasnkmush毛|goshafalasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafalasmush毛|gokishafalasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafalasmuro|shafalasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafalasnkmuro|goshafalasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafalasmuro|gokishafalasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
